text:
June 2026 Nintendo Direct pre-orders roundup

A slew of games were announced for Switch 2 and Switch today during the new Nintendo Direct, and while retailers going live with new pre-orders, we’ve gone ahead and rounded everything up. This post will be updated over the next couple of days as new products go live. We’ll also have everything in our weekly pre-order post on Sunday which...

The post June 2026 Nintendo Direct pre-orders roundup appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Final Fantasy 7 Revelation director feels streamers are causing “a bit of a crisis” for RPGs

Streaming games online for others to watch is more popular than ever today, but Final Fantasy 7 Revelation director Naoki Hamaguchi believes that it’s causing “a bit of a crisis” for RPGs. Hamaguchi explained in an interview that some fans might be more interested in simply watching a stream instead of actually playing. Because of this, he feels game developers...

The post Final Fantasy 7 Revelation director feels streamers are causing “a bit of a crisis” for RPGs appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo Switch Online DK Challenge guide – how to beat every challenge

For those taking on the brand new DK Challenge event for Nintendo Switch Online on Switch 2, we’ve got a complete guide for you. The DK Challenge is, hence its name, a Donkey Kong-focused challenge that was announced during the recent Nintendo Direct. It’s live now, and it continues until September 1 of this year. author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Pokemon Deluxe Character Guide Limited Edition pre-orders return after selling out, plus discount available

May 18: Good news for Pokemon fans: if you missed out on the Pokemon Deluxe Character Guide Limited Edition after pre-orders went live a few days ago, they’re available once again. The guide was revealed last week with two versions: a standard copy and the previously-mentioned limited edition. However, after about a day, pre-orders of the limited edition sold out...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo introduces new Switch 2 purchase requirements in Japan amid scalping concerns

The ongoing hardware market challenges impacting the global industry have claimed another victim, as Nintendo recently announced that the Nintendo Switch 2 will see a significant price increase in certain regions around the world. While the situation is already difficult for many consumers, some resellers have apparently begun taking advantage of it. According to a report published by GamesRadar, scalpers...

The post Nintendo introduces new Switch 2 purchase requirements in Japan amid scalping concerns appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Star Fox designer “choked up” by graphics in new Nintendo Switch 2 remake

Ever since it was announced, Star Fox has been drawing plenty of attention thanks to its unusually realistic visuals – a style not often associated with Nintendo titles. The impressive presentation has already left many fans eager to see more of the game ahead of its June 25 launch on Nintendo Switch 2. As of this week, players have been...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis developer explains generative AI use

Just a day after being announced for Nintendo Switch 2 with a release date of February 12, 2027, Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis has found itself at the center of controversy among fans following the appearance of an AI disclosure on the game’s Steam page. Crystal Dynamics later addressed the situation, confirming the use of the technology and explaining that...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Chained Echoes announces Nintendo Switch physical release

A physical release of Chained Echoes is finally on its way to Nintendo Switch courtesy of Super Rare Games, it’s been announced. Fans can choose between a standard copy and a deluxe edition. The latter includes a number of extras, which are detailed as follows: Hardcover A5 Art Book – uncover the characters, creatures and breathtaking landscapes that bring Valandis...

The post Chained Echoes announces Nintendo Switch physical release appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
The Drifter incoming for both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch

Today, Powerhoof announced that The Drifter will land on both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch this month. It’s launching on June 22, 2026. To say that we’ve been waiting on this one for years would be an understatement. Back in 2019, we reported that the point-and-click adventure title would be heading to the platform.  The Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch...

The post The Drifter incoming for both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Dog Man: Bark in Action announced for Nintendo Switch

Dog Man: Bark in Action is in the works for Nintendo Switch, Mindscape and Floor 84 Studio announced today. The game is due out sometime this fall. Dog Man: Bark in Action is a side-scrolling adventure platformer. Players will enter the action-packed world of the Dav Pilkey comic book series, complete with support for local co-op multiplayer. First details can...

The post Dog Man: Bark in Action announced for Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:

Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World was properly unveiled during this week’s Nintendo Direct, and Square Enix has followed up with more information that goes over the characters, story, world, monsters, and DLC. As usual, we also have new screenshots. Here’s the full rundown, as shared by Square Enix: Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World, the latest game in the...

text:
Spyro: A Realm Beyond dev explains how fans helped make the game possible

Spyro is finally getting a brand new game next year with Spyro: A Realm Beyond, and credit goes to the fans out there for help making the game happen.
